content: We can reframe state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures to use curiosity-driven exploration signals (from ICM and RND methods) to prioritize which new episodic memory traces get retained and promoted to long-term agent memory, rather than using recency or frequency alone. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where an agent’s intrinsic curiosity sculpts its memory to prioritize uncertain, information-rich experiences that improve future active learning performance.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
